text.title: OpenAPI Specification Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this API have external or internal client consumers?

conclusion.verdict: halt; skip spec for throwaway prototype

branch.question: Is the spec hand-authored or server-generated?
Is the snapshot regenerated in CI?

conclusion.verdict: wire regenerate-diff CI step before merging more changes

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
